name: marketing-os
description: Marketing OS Phase 0/1 governed backend baseline through Sprint 4; not production SaaS ready.

scripts.verify:local: node scripts/verify-sprint0.js && npm run openapi:lint:local && npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run db:seed && npm run db:migrate:local
scripts.verify:strict: node scripts/verify-sprint0.js && npm run openapi:lint:strict && npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run db:seed && npm run db:migrate:strict
